key.name: url
key.description: The URL to POST activity status to

key.name: idle-timeout
key.description: Seconds of inactivity before reporting idle

key.name: device-id
key.description: Identifier sent with each status ping. Empty means use the system hostname.

key.name: force-ping
key.description: Incremented from the prefs UI to ask the extension to immediately resend its current status

key.name: recent-pings
key.description: JSON array of recent ping entries [{timestamp, status, success}]
